title: `Alemeth #5964
definition:
Alameth or Alemeth = "covering"

 n pr m
 1) a Benjamite, son of Jehoadah or Jerah and descended from Saul through
    Jonathan
 2) a town in Benjamin
nasbUsage:
Definition: Alameth or Alemeth = "covering"

 n pr m
 1) a Benjamite, son of Jehoadah or Jerah and descended from Saul through
    Jonathan
 2) a town in Benjamin

    NASB:  a Benjamite name, also a Levitical city in Benjamin
